name: Koa'ki Meiru Wall
name_jp: コアキメイル・ウォール
desc: During each of your End Phases, destroy this card unless you send 1 "Iron Core of Koa'ki Meiru" from your hand to the GY or reveal 1 Rock monster in your hand. When your opponent activates a Spell Card (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card.
mnst_eff: During each of your End Phases, destroy this card unless you send 1 "Iron Core of Koa'ki Meiru" from your hand to the GY or reveal 1 Rock monster in your hand. When your opponent activates a Spell Card (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card.
eff: During each of your End Phases, destroy this card unless you send 1 "Iron Core of Koa'ki Meiru" from your hand to the GY or reveal 1 Rock monster in your hand. When your opponent activates a Spell Card (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
